libraryFilesRead: Baseline data analysis — source verification deferred

tasks.details: All learn/tutorial and learn/examples pages have frontmatter but no codeReferences. Tutorial pages should reference the sample projects they walk through. Examples should reference specific sample files.
Partial frontmatter gaps. Should reference relevant source files for the migration patterns described.

tasks.summary: Getting started samples may reference outdated API patterns
tasks.details: Based on findings from 2B: IDispatcher interface docs showed simplified signatures. Getting started code samples may use the simplified patterns (Task vs ValueTask, DeliveryReceipt vs IDeliveryReceipt). Need to verify all getting-started samples use correct current API.

tasks.summary: Tutorial code samples need verification against current API
tasks.details: Same concern as getting-started — tutorials are the primary onboarding path. Code samples must compile against current library version. Need full walkthrough verification.

tasks.summary: Migration guide may not cover recent API changes
tasks.details: RebuildPerspectiveCommand signature change (2→5 params), IPerspectiveWithActionsFor addition, LocalInvokeAndSyncAsync callback additions, and other API changes found in earlier sessions may need migration guide entries or notes.

tasks.summary: Code samples across all onboarding pages have auto-generated poor metadata
tasks.details: These pages are particularly important for code sample quality since they're the first thing new users see.

sectionSummary: Onboarding sections (28 pages total). Main issues: (1) 17 learn pages missing codeReferences, (2) getting-started and tutorial code samples need verification against current API (given the significant API drift found in sessions 2A-2C), (3) migration guide may not cover recent changes. No pages missing frontmatter entirely — good structural health. These pages are user-facing priority for accuracy.
